sub_modules.fir_coeff_rom: Combinational hard-coded coefficient ROM for the required 101-tap symmetric FIR coefficient set.
sub_modules.fir_symmetric_preadd: Combinational symmetric sample pre-adder that forms mirrored tap sums and forwards the center tap sample.
sub_modules.fir_parallel_mac: Combinational parallel multiply-accumulate engine using pre-added symmetric samples, center sample, and hard-coded coefficients.
